source.source_policy: Curated copy for standalone Godot use. SW_MUSH remains read-only and is not loaded at runtime.

rooms.name: Docking Bay 94 - Entrance
rooms.inspect_text: Cracked duracrete steps descend toward the famous Bay 94 pit. Beggars, dockhands, and quick-eyed opportunists watch arrivals beneath a faded De Maal Docking Services sign.

rooms.name: Docking Bay 94 - Pit Floor
rooms.inspect_text: The sunken landing floor is scorched from countless arrivals. Load lifters, fuel cells, landing lights, and cargo cover make it a natural place for the range drill.

rooms.name: Spaceport Customs Office
rooms.inspect_text: A dusty customs office where datadisks, confiscated cargo, and quiet bribes pile up faster than inspections.

rooms.name: Spaceport Speeders
rooms.inspect_text: A cluttered speeder shop smelling of lubricant, ozone, and hard bargaining. A partially stripped XP-38 occupies the best-lit work bay.

rooms.name: Docking Bay 86
rooms.inspect_text: A practical small-craft bay with brusque admin-droid service, modest landing fees, and little patience for loitering.

rooms.name: Docking Bay 87
rooms.inspect_text: A modernized bay favored by smugglers, merchants, and anyone who prefers flexible inspections.

rooms.name: Mos Eisley Street - Spaceport Row
rooms.inspect_text: A wide, dusty street linking the busiest docking bays. Jawas, vendors, and heat shimmer compete for attention between low concrete mounds.

rooms.name: Mos Eisley Spaceport Control Tower
rooms.inspect_text: A five-story observation module coordinates traffic while droids, local technicians, and the occasional Republic officer try to keep the chaos airborne.

rooms.name: Transport Depot
rooms.inspect_text: A decrepit transport terminal with rows of worn chairs, prerecorded monitors, lockers, and a cafe selling overpriced food to stranded passengers.
